Title: Bernhardt Candace Tufted Beige Upholstered Sofa
Description:
The sophisticated design and luxurious comfort of our Candace furniture series now comes in an extra-long sofa design. The pocketed frame creates an inviting home to relax and talk with friends and read a favorite book. The tufted back and arms bring added refinement. Pair the sofa with a matching chair or blend it with traditional or transitional designs for added richness. FEATURES
 Curved Sofa.
 Four throw pillows.
 Nailhead trim.
 Tufted back.

Title: Bernhardt Candace Upholstered Sofa
Description:
With its subtle crescent shape and sophisticated design details, the Candace sofa offers luxurious comfort with elegant style. Classic elements like nailhead trim and button tufting create a refined, polished look, while sleek lines and track arms add contemporary appeal. The perfect mixture of traditional and modern style. FEATURES
 (2) Blendown throw pillows - knife edge with welt - 21'' x 21''
 (2) Decorative flange pillows - 22'' x 22''

Title: Bernhardt Germain Mocha White Upholstered Sofa
Description:
Gently sloping arms give the soft frame and seats of the Germain Sofa a look of grace that blends beautifully in settings ranging from modern to traditional. Spring down cushions and fiber back pillows provide soft support while throw pillows bring additional comfort and color to the room. Wide wood legs support its sturdy frame, ensuring a comfortable place to lounge. FEATURES
 Four throw pillows.
 Multiple cushions.
 Square arms.
 Exposed wood legs.

Title: Bernhardt Germain Upholstered Sofa
Description:
The Germain sofa delivers a rich look with its clean, transitional design. With sloped arms and plush cushions, it offers unprecedented comfort. Subtle and sophisticated, the welting highlights the fine quality of the upholstery. Blendown throw pillows add a finishing touch. FEATURES
 (3) Fiber Back pillows - box edge weltless with topstitch
 (2) Blendown throw pillows - knife edge with welt - 22'' x 22''
 (2) Blendown throw pillows - knife edge with welt - 21'' x 21''
